serverDescriptions.SEND_MESSAGES: Grants the ability to send messages in channels.
serverDescriptions.REACT_TO_MESSAGES: Grants the ability to react to messages.
serverDescriptions.PIN_MESSAGES: Grants the ability to pin messages.
serverDescriptions.UPLOAD_FILES: Grants the ability to upload files in channels.
serverDescriptions.JOIN_VOICE_CHANNELS: Grants the ability to join voice channels.
serverDescriptions.SHARE_SCREEN: Grants the ability to share the screen.
serverDescriptions.ENABLE_WEBCAM: Grants the ability to enable the webcam.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_CHANNELS: Grants the ability to create, update, and delete channels.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_CHANNEL_PERMISSIONS: Grants the ability to manage channel-specific permissions for roles and users.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_CATEGORIES: Grants the ability to create, update, and delete categories.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_ROLES: Grants the ability to create, update, and delete roles.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_EMOJIS: Grants the ability to create, update, and delete emojis.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_SETTINGS: Grants the ability to manage server settings.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_USERS: Grants the ability to manage users.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_MESSAGES: Grants the ability to manage messages from all users by editing or deleting them.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_STORAGE: Grants the ability to manage storage, such as enabling or disabling uploads.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_INVITES: Grants the ability to create, edit, and delete server invites.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_UPDATES: Grants the ability to perform updates.
serverDescriptions.MANAGE_PLUGINS: Grants the ability to manage plugins.
serverDescriptions.USE_PLUGINS: Grants the ability to use plugins, such as executing plugin commands or seeing UI elements added by plugins.
serverDescriptions.VIEW_USER_SENSITIVE_DATA: Grants the ability to view user sensitive data like identity, IP address, and location.

channelDescriptions.VIEW_CHANNEL: Allows the user to view the channel.
channelDescriptions.SEND_MESSAGES: Allows the user to send messages.
channelDescriptions.JOIN: Allows the user to join the channel.
channelDescriptions.SPEAK: Allows the user to speak in voice channels.
channelDescriptions.SHARE_SCREEN: Allows the user to share their screen.
channelDescriptions.WEBCAM: Allows the user to enable their webcam.
